metadata.name: Manage a Player's Social Media Account

description: A player's agent needs to draft and post a message to the player's social media accounts.

nodes.task_description: Draft a post based on the player's instructions (e.g., thanking the fans after a win).

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes the text for the social media post.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft to the player for approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets approval from the player.

nodes.task_description: Once approved, post the message to the player's Twitter and Instagram accounts.
